title: Universal Multi-Stone Ores
description: a texture pack that makes ores consistent and change based upon the stone type they generate in
body:
![img](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/493/97/2022-09-05_03.png)

#### A texture pack that makes ores consistent("universal") with their ore pattern and change their stone "type" based upon the stone type they generate in, this is done using CTM.

<center>

### Requires: [Optifine](https://www.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https%3a%2f%2foptifine.net%2fhome) or [Continuity](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/continuity) to work

</center>

### Key:

##### ✅ - Done (Stone Type)

##### ✔️ - Done (Deepslate Type)

##### ❌ - Not Done Yet
<center>

|          | Diorite | Granite | Andesite | Terracotta | Calcite | Tuff |  Dripstone |
| -------- | :-----: | :-----: | :------: | :--------: | :-----: | :--: |:--------: |
| Coal     |    ✅    |    ✅    |    ✅     |     ✅      |    ✅    |  ✔️   |     ✅   ✔️      |
| Copper   |    ✅    |    ✅    |    ✅     |     ✅      |    ✅    |  ✔️   |     ✅  ✔️      |
| Iron     |    ✅    |    ✅    |    ✅     |     ✅      |    ✅    |  ✔️   |     ✅  ✔️      |
| Gold     |    ✅    |    ✅    |    ✅     |     ✅      |    ✅    |  ✔️   |     ✅  ✔️      |
| Lapis    |    ✅    |    ✅    |    ✅     |     ✅      |    ✅    |  ✔️   |     ✅  ✔️      |
| Redstone |    ✅    |    ✅    |    ✅     |     ✅      |    ✅    |  ✔️   |     ✅  ✔️      |
| Diamond  |    ✅    |    ✅    |    ✅     |     ✅      |    ✅    |  ✔️   |     ✅  ✔️      |
| Emerald  |    ✅    |    ✅    |    ✅     |     ✅      |    ✅    |  ✔️   |     ✅  ✔️      |
